$comment: Hand-curated list of ECI UT codes whose polygon at the default IndicatorChoropleth zoom is too small to communicate a legend bucket. Surfaced as legend-strip value chips per ADR-0029. Empty file-level `sources[]` per CLAUDE.md §12 — readability is an editorial call, not a fetched fact.

regions.notes: 36 islands ~300 km W of Kerala. Sub-pixel on the India choropleth at default zoom for any indicator.
Island chain in the Bay of Bengal. Sub-pixel on the India choropleth at default zoom for any indicator.
